subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Refuge and Shelter of those who advance toward the Kingdom of Thy sublime sanctity! Thou beholdest me beseeching at Thy Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و ملجای و ملاذ المقبلین الی ملکوت تقدیسک العظیم ترانی مستغیثا بعتبتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @firmness in the Covenant, @naming of children; of individuals
